name: discipline-equals-freedom
description: Jocko Willink's battlefield-tested field manual for achieving freedom through discipline — covering mindset, physical training, leadership, nutrition, and the warrior ethos that turns weakness into strength.
useCase: Building unshakeable self-discipline, overcoming procrastination, developing mental toughness, leading with extreme ownership, and transforming setbacks into opportunities.
knownRisks: Written in an extreme, no-compromise style that may not suit everyone's temperament
The military/warrior perspective can feel overwhelming for non-combative contexts
Some advice is deliberately provocative and should be taken in context (e.g., 'poison' for donuts is hyperbolic)
Physical training recommendations assume good health — consult a doctor before starting any workout program
The 'every day is Monday' philosophy can lead to burnout without proper recovery management
